author: Dr15Jones
body:
#### PR description:

- updated the file structure of IOMC/ParticleGuns to match modern CMSSW design
- added fillDescriptions to modules
- updated RandomXiThetaGunProducer to be a global module

#### PR validation:

Code compiles.

resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/1983
title: Modernize particle guns
